# Pearl Femme

> Pearl Femme is a women's wellness app for cycle tracking, hormone education, AI-powered meal and grocery planning, and a curated content community. Built mobile-first with bilingual (English/Spanish) support.

Pearl Femme helps women understand their bodies through cycle tracking, phase-aware education, and a Luxe-tier (Ruby) AI assistant that generates personalized meal plans, grocery lists, and daily insights.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Daily dashboard with cycle phase, mood logging, and AI daily insight.
- [Track](/track): Log periods, symptoms, and mood across your cycle.
- [Learn](/learn): Hormone education, phase guides, and curated wellness resources.
- [Community](/community): Curated articles inspired by foundational women's health books.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Pearl (free), Swan, and Ruby subscription tiers.
- [Care](/care): Find women's health brands, shops, and providers near you.
- [Womb Care](/womb-care): Womb-care providers, resources, and submissions.

## Phase guides

- [Follicular Phase](/learn/follicular-phase)
- [Ovulation Phase](/learn/ovulation-phase)
- [Luteal Phase](/learn/luteal-phase)
- [Menstruation Phase](/learn/menstruation-phase)
- [Egg Freezing](/learn/egg-freezing)
- [Maternal Health](/learn/maternal-health)

## Optional

- [Recipes](/recipes): Phase-aligned recipe library.
- [Food Swaps](/food-swaps): Hormone-friendly food substitutions.
- [Reports](/reports): Downloadable phase and cycle PDF reports.
- [Terms](/legal/terms)
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy)
